task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Traffic puzzle activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Traffic activity is open, displaying a parking lot with cars (a sliding-block puzzle).

task_completion.description: Start Level 1 of the Traffic puzzle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The game UI indicates that Level 1 is currently active.

task_completion.description: Solve Level 1 of the Traffic puzzle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The red car is shown moving through or having passed the exit gate on the right, or a 'level completed' success screen/animation is displayed for Level 1.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed level to /tmp/traffic_completed.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, screenshot tool, or file manager shows the screenshot being saved to or existing at the exact path '/tmp/traffic_completed.png'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris application
integrity.visual_evidence: The GCompris window is a native application running on the system, not a web browser displaying an image or video of the game.

integrity.description: The puzzle was solved through genuine interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory screenshots show cars being moved sequentially to clear the path, rather than instantly jumping to a completed state using a downloaded image.

integrity.description: The screenshot was genuinely captured from the screen
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved file '/tmp/traffic_completed.png' is a real image capture of the agent's desktop/gameplay, not a mock file created via echo or touch commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris is an educational software suite. The 'Traffic' activity is a Rush Hour-style sliding-block puzzle where the objective is to remove the red car from the parking lot through the gate on the right. The expected output is a screenshot of the completed level saved exactly to '/tmp/traffic_completed.png'.
